_comment: Example DAG demonstrating worker affinity configuration - v1.5.2
_description: This DAG is configured to run on a specific worker for optimal performance
name: worker_affinity_example_dag

worker_affinity._comment: Worker affinity configuration - choose ONE option below
worker_affinity._pinned_worker_note: Pin this DAG to Worker 0. Set to null to disable.
worker_affinity._exclusive_note: If true, this DAG gets a dedicated worker with no other DAGs
worker_affinity._preferred_workers_note: List of preferred worker IDs. System will try these first.

_calculator_note: Calculators repointed from fictional example_calculators/* classes to the built-in PassthruCalculator so this example builds and clones out-of-the-box. Replace 'type' with your own dotted-path calculator (module.ClassName) to do real work.
